text_original: When the Great Dao (Way or Method) ceased to be observed, benevolence and righteousness came into vogue.
text_normalized: When the Great Dao (Way or Method) ceased to be observed, benevolence and righteousness came into vogue.

text_original: (Then) appeared wisdom and shrewdness, and there ensued great hypocrisy.
text_normalized: (Then) appeared wisdom and shrewdness, and there ensued great hypocrisy.

text_original: When harmony no longer prevailed throughout the six kinships, filial sons found their manifestation; when the states and clans fell into disorder, loyal ministers appeared.
text_normalized: When harmony no longer prevailed throughout the six kinships, filial sons found their manifestation; when the states and clans fell into disorder, loyal ministers appeared.
